title: Extra Trinkets
description: Adds practical slots to Trinkets, so your inventory isn't as cluttered.
body:
Extra Trinkets is a data pack and resource pack combined into a .jar for the mods folder. It adds practical slots to Trinkets, so your inventory isn't as cluttered. # Slots
Spoiler - Wrench - Holds - `#c:wrenches` - 1 Slot - Notes - Wrenches can also be put in the Belt slot. - Remote - Holds - `create:linked_controller`, `weird-wares:sculk_remote` - 5 Slots - Notes - These can also be put in the Belt slot. - Clipboard - Holds - `create:clipboard` - 1 Slot - Notes - Why look at notes here when you could write them on your clipboard? - Potion - Holds - `minecraft:potion` - 2 Slots - Notes - Can hold any potion - Vanilla or modded - Shard Tablet - Holds - `scattered_shards:shard_tablet` - 1 Slot - Notes - No notes just shards
You can also put Create Super Glue in the existing belt slot. Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/B6bMWPbQyj) if you want support or to request features like compatibility with a mod.
